eas_text: A civil authority has issued A LOCAL AREA EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: San Juan, UT; at 3:31 PM on JUL 13, 2026 Effective until 3:31 PM JUL 14, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: SET STATUS ALERT has been issued in San Juan County for the following areas:CY1, CY2, Peters Hill West, Airport, Energy, SJC 1 SJC 2, SJC 4, SJC Dude Ranch, MC1, MC3, MC4 MC7, MC8, MC10, MC11, MC12, MC17, MC 18, MC19, MC20, MC22 .  Residents in these areas should be prepared to leave if conditions worsen. This is NOT an evacuation order. Residents in these areas should be prepared to leave if conditions worsen.
